title: Shell exec with user input
description: child_process exec with user-controlled input enables shell command injection.
remediation: Use execFile() with argument array instead

title: spawn with shell option enabled
description: spawn() with shell:true re-enables shell interpretation.

title: Python os.system/subprocess with user input
description: Shell command execution with user-controlled input.
remediation: Use subprocess.run() with argument list and shell=False

title: Server-side template injection (SSTI)
description: User input rendered as a server-side template.
remediation: Never render user input as template. Use pre-compiled templates.

title: LDAP query with unsanitized input
description: LDAP query with unescaped user input.

title: XPath query with unsanitized input
description: XPath query built with unescaped user input.

title: HTTP response header injection
description: User input directly set as HTTP response header.
remediation: Validate and sanitize before setting headers

title: Fetch with user-controlled URL
description: Server-side HTTP request to user-supplied URL.
remediation: Validate URLs against allowlist, block internal IPs

title: Prototype pollution via deep merge
description: Deep merge of user input may allow __proto__ pollution.
remediation: Filter __proto__, constructor, prototype keys from input
